sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: fat is 1.3g. omega 3 is doing serious work here. for a grain, this is really about carb behaviour.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: carbs is 75.9g. the fibre support does a lot of the heavy lifting. for grains, the real question is whether those carbs come with enough fibre and stability.
sections.subtitleText: carbs is 75.9g. the fibre support does a lot of the heavy lifting. for grains, the real question is whether those carbs come with enough fibre and stability.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: protein is 12.3g. protein quality is clearly one of the selling points. protein helps, but grains still need the carb side to stay under control.
sections.subtitleText: protein is 12.3g. protein quality is clearly one of the selling points. protein helps, but grains still need the carb side to stay under control.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin e at 0% DV stand out most. that is not enough to move the verdict very far on its own.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: magnesium at 41% DV, iron at 14% DV, zinc at 13% DV stand out most. that is useful, but still not a huge mineral edge.
sections.subtitleText: magnesium at 41% DV, iron at 14% DV, zinc at 13% DV stand out most. that is useful, but still not a huge mineral edge.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: on the plus side. useful staple energy source because that matters because grains are often judged by how practical they are in real diets. works as a meal anchor because a lot of value comes from being easy to build around. usually affordable and scalable because practicality matters for staple foods.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: the drawbacks next. protein quality is limited because even the better grains usually need pairing. carb load is still the main burden because that is the category risk no grain fully escapes. quality can drop fast with processing because the grain category punishes refinement pretty hard.

closing.summary: Bulgur stands out for useful staple energy source and works as a meal anchor. but it also gets held back by protein quality is limited and carb load is still the main burden. Best when you want a staple carb that actually brings something useful with it.
